summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Governance Engine - Backend 100% functional, Frontend mostly working with minor UI/UX issues

ui_bugs.issue: Export buttons (JSON/Markdown) not easily accessible in UI despite working API
Frequent loading spinners during page navigation causing UX delays

integration_issues.issue: Some steps get stuck in loading state preventing full workflow completion

passed_tests: Backend API health check and all CRUD operations
Dashboard loads with correct stats (1 client, 1 system, 1 assessment, score 100)
Risk Distribution pie chart displays LOW risk segment correctly
Recent Assessments shows assessment with score 100 and LOW badge
Clients page displays Demo Corp client card with proper details
AI Systems page displays Customer Support AI system card
New Assessment wizard Steps 1-2 work (client/system selection, control status)
History page displays assessment list with working filters
Navigation between all pages functions correctly
Modal dialogs work correctly (z-index fix verified at z-51)
Assessment results show correct score gauge and risk tier
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Make export buttons more prominent/accessible on Assessment Result page 2) Optimize loading states to reduce navigation delays 3) Debug assessment wizard Step 3 completion flow
